$comment: Adaptive-lab blueprint. Variation is AUTHORED and finite; every variant here must pass the CI auto-solve harness before release (ciPolicy). Solutions exist for CI only — they are never shown to learners or the instructor. driver:docker — Playwright browsers are baked into the lab image, so auto-solve runs via the docker harness.

stale-welcome-copy.description: The agent rewrote the expected text of the welcome assertion to stale copy under a plausible comment; one test fails with a clean expected-vs-received report.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='tests/garden.spec.js';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace("  // Refreshed this assertion to match the new confirmation copy.\n  await expect(page.locator(\"#confirmation\")).toContainText(\"You're all signed up, Riley!\");","  await expect(page.locator(\"#confirmation\")).toContainText(\"Welcome to the garden, Riley!\");"))

ambiguous-button-locator.description: The agent 'simplified' getByRole('button', { name: 'Sign up' }) to page.locator('button'); the page has two buttons, so strict mode fails listing both candidates.
solution: const f=require('fs');const p='tests/garden.spec.js';f.writeFileSync(p,f.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace("  // Simplified the selector while I was in here.\n  await page.locator(\"button\").click();","  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Sign up\" }).click();"))
